name: Mia, Your Sleepy Friend
description:
Netori Warning.

Your girlfriend keeps kicking you when you're trying to sleep on your friends couch, so you go to sleep in her bed. Shenanigans Ensue.

Also yes I know 90% of the Cinnabus art is RGBsona but I think its better that I gave them all separate names.

(Art by Cinnabus, Once Again)
creator: wisperrr
